tier_b_items.reason: Mostly lists products; lacks trend or thematic synthesis.
No causal explanations; just product attributes.
Mentions sources but no explicit cross-comparison.
No acknowledgment of limitations or counterpoints.
Report truncated; no actionable recommendations shown.

details.raw_judge_output:
1. FAIL - Mostly lists products; lacks trend or thematic synthesis.  
2. FAIL - No causal explanations; just product attributes.  
3. FAIL - Mentions sources but no explicit cross-comparison.  
4. FAIL - No synthesized insight beyond cataloging.  
5. FAIL - No acknowledgment of limitations or counterpoints.  
6. FAIL - Report truncated; no actionable recommendations shown.

tier_b_items.reason: Only product listing, no intro-analysis-conclusion structure
No visible transitions or bridging text
Formatting consistent within table, uniform style
Professional factual tone, no AI filler phrases

details.raw_judge_output:
1. FAIL - Only product listing, no intro-analysis-conclusion structure  
2. FAIL - No visible transitions or bridging text  
3. PASS - Lacks meta-commentary statements  
4. PASS - Formatting consistent within table, uniform style  
5. FAIL - No conclusion or synthesis present  
6. PASS - Professional factual tone, no AI filler phrases
